---
title: "Variable Distributions"
---

Per-variable summaries for each clean asset -- row counts, missingness, distinct values, and a
type-aware summary -- generated from `data/clean/` so they never drift from the data.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
library(here)
files <- list.files(here::here("docs/_generated"), pattern = "^dist_.*[.]rds$", full.names = TRUE)
if (!length(files)) {
  cat("::: {.callout-note}\nNo assets built yet -- run the pipeline first.\n:::\n")
} else {
  for (f in sort(files)) {
    asset <- sub("^dist_(.*)[.]rds$", "\\1", basename(f))
    cat("\n\n### ", asset, "\n\n")
    d <- readRDS(f)
    print(knitr::kable(d, col.names = c("Column","Type","N","Missing","% Miss","Distinct","Summary")))
  }
}
```
